prompt: A cozy, warm, hand-drawn storybook illustration of the British countryside on a bright cheerful day — a wide panoramic landscape. Gently rolling green hills quilted with hedgerows and dry-stone walls. Nestled in a valley in the lower two-thirds sits a small, snug English village with a cluster of stone cottages with slate roofs and warm chimneys; rising above the rooftops are TWO stone CHURCHES with tall pointed steeples/spires, the tallest catching the light. A winding country lane curves through the fields down toward the village, flanked by a few rounded oak and chestnut trees and flowering hedgerows. Distant softer hills fade into a gentle haze on the horizon. SKY: the UPPER THIRD is a calm, uncluttered, soft warm blue sky with a few gentle wispy white clouds and a wash of amber-golden morning light — kept simple and airy so nothing competes there. LIGHTING: warm, inviting, gentle amber-golden sunlight (echo warm golden honey tones, accent colour amber #f59e0b) washing over the hills and gilding the church steeples. STYLE: painterly hand-drawn children's-picture-book illustration, soft gouache/watercolour texture with visible gentle brushwork, rounded friendly shapes, warm and whimsical and heartwarming, NOT photorealistic, not a 3D render, not a flat vector cartoon. COMPOSITION: keep the top third calm and open (sky only), place all the detailed village, hills, churches and lane in the lower two-thirds. No text, no words, no letters, no signage, no close-up people or faces. Peaceful, hopeful, welcoming mood.

The SAME cozy British countryside scene as the reference image — the exact same rolling green hills, the same valley village of stone cottages with slate roofs, the same TWO stone CHURCHES with tall steeples poking above the rooftops, the same winding country lane and the same trees and hedgerows in the same positions and composition — but now painted at GOLDEN HOUR / early dusk for a dark theme. SKY: the UPPER THIRD glows with a warm sunset — soft bands of amber, rose-gold, peach and deepening dusky blue-purple above, with a few gentle clouds lit warm along their undersides; kept calm and uncluttered at the top. LIGHTING: deeper, richer, cozier tones; long warm shadows across the hills; the low sun gilds the church steeples and rooftops in honey-amber light (accent colour amber #f59e0b). The village feels snug and alive: a scattering of little cottage WINDOWS glow warm yellow-orange, and a soft warm amber glow rises from the heart of the village. Hills fall into cooler blue-violet twilight shadow. STYLE: identical painterly hand-drawn children's-picture-book illustration, soft gouache/watercolour texture with gentle visible brushwork, rounded friendly shapes, warm whimsical heartwarming mood, NOT photorealistic, not a 3D render, not a flat vector cartoon. COMPOSITION: keep the top third calm and open (sunset sky only), all detail in the lower two-thirds, matching the reference. No text, no words, no letters, no signage, no close-up people or faces. Peaceful, restful, cozy evening mood.
